name: sulis
description: Sulis — the canonical front-door plugin for the Sulis AI marketplace. Hosts the founder-facing Sulis agent, the journey skills, three meta-skills (add-skill / add-agent / consolidate-into-sulis), the requirements / design / execution / review surfaces consolidated from the four specialist plugins, the deep-mode code-health framework, and 8 cross-cutting standards. Founders interact via /sulis:* commands. See CHANGELOG.md for version history.
